channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: IRA coming to Switch 2 this summer
item.content:encoded:
• Switch 2

Roguelike action shoot 'em up currently available for PC.

Publishers Nicalis and Pikii, and developer ABShot will release roguelike action shoot ’em up IRA for Switch 2 via Nintendo eShop this summer, the companies announced.

IRA first launched in Early Access for PC via Steam on August 31, 2021, followed by a full release via Steam, Epic Games Store, and GOG on October 3, 2023.

Here is an overview of the game, via Nicalis:

In IRA, players assume the role of a young girl named Yeon who bravely battles the forces of Chaos by channeling the power of an ancient god and their apostles. Your overarching task is to locate the scattered pieces of the powerful Ira crystal—rebuilding it is the only way to defeat Chaos and restore peace. You attack by firing arrows from any of 150+ different bows, and you can earn many different kinds of power-ups, with both active and passive effects.

Developed by Korean studio ABShot with Nicalis, IRA is a unique anime-inspired shooter with procedurally generated levels and random weapon drops, ensuring a different experience each time it’s played. A key to the game’s appeal are the hypnotic “bullet hell” patterns of the enemies’ (and bosses’) attacks; their projectiles vary greatly in movement type, frequency, visual appearance, speed, size, effects and destructive power. To survive, you must quickly assess their intricate weblike geometry, seek out the short-lived gaps in between and return fire before the bullets overwhelm you.

Watch a new trailer below.

Switch 2 Announce Teaser Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/ira-coming-to-switch-2-this-summer
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Trails in the Sky 2nd Chapter details more characters, ‘Brave Rush’ and ‘Enforcer Burst’ systems
item.content:encoded:
Falcom has released new information and screenshots for Trails in the Sky 2nd Chapter introducing characters Campanella, Bleublanc, Walter, Luciola, Josette Capua, Kyle Capua, and Don Capua, as well as the “Brave Rush” and “Enforcer Burst” systems.

Get the details below.

■ Characters

Campanella (voiced by Zach Aguilar in English, Kanae Itou in Japanese)

  • Age: ???

An enigmatic Enforcer of Ouroboros. He has the face of a teenage boy, but his true age is unknown.

Bestowed with the special designation of Enforcer No. 0, Campanella has been dispatched by the Society to simply observe the execution of Weissmann the Faceless’ grand plan.

An elusive figure, Campanella comes and goes in bursts of illusory flame, leaving only cryptic and mocking remarks in his wake.

Phantom Thief Bleublanc (voiced by Kirk Thornton in English, Kishou Taniyama in Japanese)

  • Age: 29

Enforcer No. X, the Phantom Thief.

Conducting nefarious schemes under the alias “Phantom Thief B,” Bleublanc has orchestrated chaos in cities throughout Zemuria. He has joined the Society in pursuit of his aesthetic philosophy: “Beauty is born from dignity—from outshining everyone.”

Bleublanc combines flamboyant theatrics with crafty techniques to bewilder and outmaneuver his foes.

Walter, the Direwolf (voiced by Keith Silverstein in English, Takahiro Yoshimizu in Japanese)

  • Age: 31

Enforcer No. VIII, known as the Direwolf.

Walter is a martial artist who has taken techniques from various martial arts schools across the continent to create his deadly “Murderer’s Fist,” perfectly honed to take human lives.

Fierce and cold-blooded, Walter shows no mercy in combat, even against women and children.

Like the bracer Zin, it seems he has ties to Taito, one of the three great Eastern martial arts schools…

Luciola, the Bewitching Bell (voiced by Natalie Van Sistine in English, Ryouka Yuzuki in Japanese)

  • Age: 27

Enforcer No. VI of Ouroboros. A beguiling woman clad in alluring garb, armed with a pair of folding fans.

Known as the “Bewitching Bell,” Luciola uses her signature bell to conjure illusions and wields her fans to perform attacks as elegant as they are lethal.

Unlike the other Enforcers, she seems to have a deeply personal reason for coming to Liberl…

Josette Capua (voiced by Risa Mei in English, Anna Nagase in Japanese)

  • Age: 16

The youngest of the Capua siblings and the only girl amongst the Sky Pirates, Josette is a skillful wielder of both arts and her orbal gun.

Though she has a fiery attitude on the surface, Josette is actually a responsible figure who handles all the sky pirate gang’s day-to-day needs. The other pirates, aside from her brothers, respectfully refer to her as “Miss.”

She and Estelle never see eye to eye, and their interactions inevitably devolve into childish bickering when their paths cross.

Kyle Capua (voiced by Kieran Regan in English, Atsushi Tamaru in Japanese)

  • Age: 23

The middle child of the Capua siblings and the pilot of their airship.

Kyle’s innate piloting talent lets him maneuver the mobile Bobcat with ease, and his keen intellect often makes him the crew’s primary strategist.

While he tries to respect Josette’s wishes, he seems to harbor misgivings deep down about his own younger sister risking her life as part of their pirate gang.

Don Capua (voiced by Harry Wood in English, Teruyuki Tanzawa in Japanese)

  • Age: 30

The eldest Capua sibling and big boss of their crew.

Though he was manipulated into committing malicious crimes during the events of 1st Chapter, Don’s true personality is that of a courageous, straightforward man devoted to his family and friends.

After he and his crew were imprisoned, they took advantage of the confusion in Liberl in the wake of the coup attempt, breaking out of jail and disappearing.

■ System

Brave Rush

Trails in the Sky 2nd Chapter introduces new, wide-range, high-damage Brave Rush attacks! Use two Brave Gauge points in Quick Battle to pair your active character with a party member and unleash a devastating combo strike!

The Brave Rush mechanic joins the lineup of normal attacks, jump attacks, dodges, and character-specific Crafts to further expand your tactical options in battle!

Enforcer Boost

An advanced version of Rage Boost that can only be used by the Enforcers of Ouroboros.

When activated, a character-specific animation plays and the appearance of the battlefield changes.

Since the boost state lasts longer than a standard Rage Boost, the battle difficulty increases dramatically!

—About Rage Boost

Some powerful enemies and bosses can enter a Rage Boost state. While active, they gain unavoidable attacks, halved delay, and can even steal AT Bonuses. Since various other stats are also buffed, the tide of battle can be turned against you in an instant…!



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/trails-in-the-sky-2nd-chapter-details-more-characters-brave-rush-and-enforcer-burst-systems
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Drecom establishes indie game studio Drecom Creators Studio
item.content:encoded:
Exhibiting at BitSummit PUNCH from May 22 to 24.

Drecom has announced the establishment of Drecom Creators Studio, an “indie game studio dedicated to supporting game creators, discovering and nurturing talent, and bringing their works to the world.”

The newly founded studio will exhibit at BitSummit PUNCH, which will run from May 22 to 24 at Miyako Messe in Kyoto, Japan, where it will have a demo area set up for titles it is supporting. Details about the playable demo titles will be announced in the leadup to the exhibition.

Here is an overview of the studio, via Drecom:

The Vision of Drecom Creators Studio

Drecom Creators Studio is an indie game studio dedicated to discovering the potential of works created by game creators and providing comprehensive support, from development through to long-term intellectual property expansion. We cater to a wide range of projects, from solo creators to small teams, and aim to ensure that these works continue to be loved across generations and borders while preserving the creators’ artistic vision and the essence of their work.

Through comprehensive support, including the sharing of development expertise, financial assistance, marketing support, and integrated media campaigns. We create an environment where creators can focus on their work, unlock the full potential of their creations, and together bring them to the world.

Background to the Establishment of Drecom Creators Studio

In recent years, Drecom has been working to bring excitement to a wider audience through the provision of IP-based entertainment content. By supporting game creators, discovering and nurturing their works, and bringing them to the world, we aim to contribute to the growth of the game industry including its creators, and to the advancement of Japanese entertainment.

Message From Drecom Creators Studio

Drecom is involved in media mix projects, including novelizations, comic adaptations, anime adaptations, and merchandise, that go beyond game development, operation, and distribution. One notable example of this is our commitment to the Wizardry series, which has continued to captivate audiences worldwide for over 40 years. We have created Blade & Bastard from this great intellectual property and have realized a comprehensive media mix spanning novels, comics, anime adaptations, and merchandise.

In addition, the 3D dungeon RPG Wizardry Variants Daphne (iOS, Android, Steam), which has been available since October 2024, has surpassed three million downloads worldwide. Even as we speak, it continues to captivate adventurers around the globe.

We at Drecom Creators Studio are currently seeking creators to join us in crafting the stories of the future, drawing on the expertise and passion we have cultivated through our work in intellectual property production.

Detailed information about Drecom Creators Studio and the application for creators are now available on the official website. We look forward to receiving applications from many creators.

Visit Drecom Creators Studio’s official website here.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/drecom-establishes-indie-game-studio-drecom-creators-studio
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Granblue Fantasy: Relink – Endless Ragnarok pre-orders now available
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS4
  • PS5
  • Switch 2

New playable characters Fraux and Fediel revealed.

Pre-orders for Granblue Fantasy: Relink – Endless Ragnarok are now available, publisher Cygames and developer Cygames Osaka announced.

The game is available in the following editions:

  • Granblue Fantasy: Relink – Endless Ragnarok
    • Standard Edition ($59.99 / £49.99 / €59.99 / ¥ 6,930)
      • Granblue Fantasy: Relink
      • Granblue Fantasy: Relink – Endless Ragnarok Upgrade Kit
    • Special Edition ($79.99 / £64.99 / €79.99 / ¥9,900)
      • Granblue Fantasy: Relink
      • Granblue Fantasy: Relink – Endless Ragnarok Upgrade Kit
      • Granblue Fantasy: Relink – Endless Ragnarok Special Pack – Includes special character colors for the captain, Id, and Sandalphon. Also comes with useful items for unlocking Seofon, Tweyen, and Sandalphon.
      • Concept Art Color Pack
        • The Captain (Gran/Djeeta)
        • Id
        • Sandalphon
      • Azurite’s Splendor (x5)
      • Canaan Whitebloom (x3)
      • Supreme Weapon Essence (x6)
      • Granblue Fantasy: Relink Downloadable Content Collection – This is a collection of previously released downloadable content for Granblue Fantasy: Relink. It includes useful items for making upgrades, 5 sets of colors for characters, and three sets of emotes.
        • Ignition Pack
          • Weapon: False Sword of the Apocalypse
          • Glittercrystal (x30)
          • 500 MSP
        • Fortitude Crystal (S) (x50)
        • Color Packs 1 to 5
        • Emote Expansion Sets: Let’s Chat, I Work Out, Grab Bag
  • Granblue Fantasy: Relink – Endless Ragnarok Upgrade Kit
    • Upgrade Kit Standard Edition ($29.99 / £24.99 / €29.99 / ¥3,960)
      • Granblue Fantasy: Relink – Endless Ragnarok Upgrade Kit
    • Upgade Kit Special Edition ($54.99 / £44.99 / €54.99 / ¥ 6,490)
      • Granblue Fantasy: Relink – Endless Ragnarok Upgrade Kit
      • Granblue Fantasy: Relink – Endless Ragnarok Special Pack – Includes special character colors for the captain, Id, and Sandalphon. Also comes with useful items for unlocking Seofon, Tweyen, and Sandalphon.
      • Concept Art Color Pack
        • The Captain (Gran/Djeeta)
        • Id
        • Sandalphon
      • Azurite’s Splendor (x5)
      • Canaan Whitebloom (x3)
      • Supreme Weapon Essence (x6)
      • Granblue Fantasy: Relink Downloadable Content Collection – This is a collection of previously released downloadable content for Granblue Fantasy: Relink. It includes useful items for making upgrades, 5 sets of colors for characters, and three sets of emotes.
        • Ignition Pack
          • Weapon: False Sword of the Apocalypse
          • Glittercrystal (x30)
          • 500 MSP
        • Fortitude Crystal (S) (x50)
        • Color Packs 1 to 5
        • Emote Expansion Sets: Let’s Chat, I Work Out, Grab Bag

Pre-orders for all editions include the “Guts III & Autorevive III Sigil Set,” which contains the “Guts III Sigil” and “Autorevive III Sigil.” Pre-orders on PlayStation 5, PlayStation 4, and PC include immediate access to the base Granblue Fantasy: Relink game and Granblue Fantasy: Relink Downloadable Content Collection where applicable.

A new set of trailers was also released. The “Strength and Darkness” trailer reveals new playable characters Fraux and Fediel, as well as the new foe The World. The “Summons and the Conflux” trailer introduces the  Summons and Conflux systems. Here are the details, via the official website:

New Playable Characters

  • Fraux (voiced by Kelly Baskin in English, Azumi Asakura in Japanese) – Striking Strength. Pactbearer to The Devil, a primal seeking to create a new world order, Fraux is otherwise an ordinary skydweller whose heart, character, and temperament are filled with love and compassion.
  • Fediel (voiced by Savy Des-Etages in English, Asami Tano in Japanese) – Darkness Personified. Fediel is one of the Six Dragons, entities who exist beyond the confines of the natural world. Having dominion over darkness, she influences the very laws of nature.

New Foe

  • The World (voiced by Kellen Goff in English, Atsushi Ono in Japanese) – Inchoate World. One of the Arcarum, The World is the plinth and pillar to which the other Arcarum are tied. Originally created by the Astrals in ancient times, it eventually evolved to a state of self-awareness and self-actualization, developing its own identity.

New Systems

  • Summons – Call forth the power of enemies and allies alike. Summons provide a new dimension to combat with their own unique attack skills and powerful support abilities.
  • Primal Bursts – Summon the might of Proto Bahamut and Excavallion. Once certain battle conditions are fulfilled, activate Skybound Arts with all four members of the party to obliterate your foes with a stunning primal burst.
  • Chaos Quests – Face off against the dread might of the Ragnalia in the most challenging tier of quests yet. Tackling Chaos quests will unfurl a new chapter in the Relink saga and shed light on the fresh chaos consuming Zegagrande
  • The Conflux – Solve puzzles and fight your way through a multitude of battles to arrive at the heart of a dimension replete with singular power. Take advantage of special traits and buffs only available in the Conflux to power up your characters and conquer the awaiting trials. Should you succeed in plumbing its depths, you’ll obtain a wealth of treasure to enhance your characters and weapons and bring out their true power.
  • Cross-Play – Endless Ragnarok features crossplay between Nintendo Switch 2, PlayStation 5, PlayStation 4, and Steam. Nintendo Switch 2 players will also be able to use Local Communication to engage in up to four-player cooperative play!

And here is an overview of the game, via Cygames:

About

Known for its dynamic combat, ensemble of versatile characters, and thrilling online cooperative play, Granblue Fantasy: Relink returns with expanded solo and multiplayer content, bringing endless adventure to skyfarers both new and old.

Key Features

  • Band Together for Exhilarating Battles – Form a party of four and depart for battle in this epic action RPG. Each character sports distinct combat mechanics, allowing for a whole crewful of unique playstyles. Weave these playstyles together using satisfying party-based attacks—like link attacks and chain bursts—to really make combat soar. Even recruits fresh to action gaming can take advantage of Assist Mode to reach the story’s heart-pounding conclusion.
  • Embark on an Endless Variety of Cooperative Quests – A wide range of quests become available as the adventure unfolds. From unique boss fights to horde-survival missions, all quests are playable offline or online with up to four players. Whether it’s casual questing or ultra-challenging end content, there’s something for everyone to enjoy.
  • Major Additions in Endless Ragnarok – From new stories to game modes, Granblue Fantasy: Relink has been refined and revamped for the ultimate action RPG experience.
  • Embark on New Adventures – Although the Astral Lilith’s machinations lay thwarted, winds of change begin to stir within the Zegagrande Skydom… Strange beings called the “ragnalia” herald the end times. Mysterious gateways beckon would-be challengers into a realm of chaos. And even the mighty Beelzebub, with his wings of steel, descends upon Zegagrande.
  • Call in the Big Guns – During their journey, players will unlock the ability to equip and call forth summons, adding a new dimension to battle strategy. Once channeled by Lyria, some summons can be temporarily controlled by the player; but if certain conditions are met, others will make a spectacular entrance alongside a new type of chain burst—the “primal burst.”
  • More to Master, More to Play
    • New cooperative quest tiers and additional bosses.
    • The Conflux, an all-new solo mode where unpredictable challenges and enigmatic powers lurk within its depths.
    • The introduction of master traits to push characters beyond their limits.
    • Summons to expand on tactical options.
    • All of these features—and more—ensure that even after the credits roll, Granblue Fantasy: Relink‘s skies remain vast!
  • Play Across Boundaries – Granblue Fantasy: Relink’s thrilling four-player online cooperative combat reaches new heights with cross-play across all platforms!

Granblue Fantasy: Relink – Endless Ragnarok is due out for PlayStation 5, Switch 2, PlayStation 4, and PC via Steam on July 9.

Watch the trailers below.

Strength and Darkness Trailer

English

Japanese

Summons and the Conflux

English

Japanese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/granblue-fantasy-relink-endless-ragnarok-pre-orders-now-available
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: LIMIT ZERO BREAKERS ‘Prologue Test’ set for June 10 to 15
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Sign-ups now available.

Publisher NCSOFT and developer Vic Game Studios will host the “Prologue Test’ for anime-style action RPG LIMIT ZERO BREAKERS from June 10 to 15, the companies announced. It will be available for PC via Steam, iOS, and Android. Sign-ups are available now via the official website.

Here are the details:

Prologue Test Recruitment & Schedule Information

  • Recruitment Period: Through June 2, 2026 at 6:00 AM (PDT)
  • Participants: Selected at random from users who signed up for the Prologue Test
  • Test Period: June 10, 2026 to June 15, 2026
  • Platforms: PC (Steam), Android, iOS​

Prologue Test Sign-up Information

  • You can sign up via the [Prologue Test Sign-up] button on the official website.

*When signing up for mobile platforms (Android/iOS), please use an active email address.
*For Steam sign-ups, please complete your application by clicking the “Request Access” button on the Steam page after being redirected. This will successfully submit your application. (Additional instructions will be provided separately through the official announcement.)

Participant Selection Announcement Information

  • Selected participants will be announced separately after the recruitment period ends. Additional details regarding pre-download and participation instructions will also be shared at that time.

Notes

  • A full FAQ is available here.
  • The LIMIT ZERO BREAKERS Prologue Test will be conducted as a closed test with a limited number of participants. Only selected users will be eligible to participate.
  • All communications and access permissions will be provided based on the email address submitted during the Prologue Test sign-up. Please make sure your email address is entered correctly.
  • Please note that users who are not selected will not receive a separate notification email.
  • Selection notifications will be sent out in stages and may be subject to delays depending on internal circumstances.
  • The Prologue Test build is still under development. As such, server instability and bugs may occur, and maintenance may be conducted during the test period as needed.

Watch a new trailer below.

Prologue Test Trailer

English

Japanese

Korean



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/limit-zero-breakers-prologue-test-set-for-june-10-to-15
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Virtual Boy – Nintendo Classics adds V-Tetris, Jack Bros., Space Invaders Virtual Collection, Virtual Bowling, and Vertical Force
item.content:encoded:
• Switch
  • Switch 2

Plus Virtual Fishing in Japan.

The Virtual Boy – Nintendo Classics app has added V-Tetris, Jack Bros., Space Invaders Virtual Collection, Virtual Bowling, and Vertical Force, Nintendo announced. In Japan, Virtual Fishing was also added.

Watch a trailer below.

May 2026 Game Updates

English

Japanese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/virtual-boy-nintendo-classics-adds-v-tetris-jack-bros-space-invaders-virtual-collection-virtual-bowling-and-vertical-force
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
